workspace.name: Zaylan
workspace.story: Zaylan is the demo nonprofit used to showcase Octopus to prospective customers. Its data is generated by the seed_marketing_demo management command and reset whenever fresh screenshots are needed.

projects.title: Reading Confidence
projects.description: After-school literacy support for children aged 8-12.

projects.title: Book Drive
projects.description: Quarterly book collection and distribution to under-resourced schools.

recipients_category.name: Literacy Students
recipients_category.description: Children enrolled in Zaylan's literacy programs.
